rationale: Updated 2026-05-05 (storage-roadmap.md Stage 7 / PR #054 sub): production count 11 → 10 after migrating apps/web/src/modules/finyk/lib/storageManager.ts off direct localStorage onto safeReadStringLS / safeWriteLS / safeRemoveLS у тілі finto→finyk rename-міграції; також dropped dead exports `key`/`getJSON`/`setJSON` (0 consumers).
